# Athabasca Field

**Summary**: A major heavy oil field in the Athabasca region.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2015-khan|KHAN, 2015]] used Athabasca and Cold Lake as model cases for SAGD and VAPEX simulation.

## Geological and Structural Setting

- [[2015-khan|KHAN, 2015]] Heavy oil reservoir

## Key Findings From This Location

- The study concluded that well configuration significantly impacts energy delivery and flow dynamics in these reservoirs. ([[2015-khan|KHAN, 2015, p. 44]])
